profile.name: Nathumini Jayathilake
profile.headline: Final Year Computer Science Undergraduate | Aspiring Data Scientist | Data Analytics | AI & Machine Learning Enthusiast
profile.about:
I am a Final Year Computer Science undergraduate at the University of Staffordshire (APIIT Sri Lanka) with a strong interest in Data Analytics, Data Science, and Machine Learning.

I enjoy transforming raw data into meaningful insights that support better decision-making. Through academic and personal projects, I have gained experience in data analysis, predictive modeling, machine learning, and data visualization using Python, SQL, Pandas, Scikit-learn, and Power BI.

My recent work includes developing a machine learning-based decision analytics solution for electricity demand risk forecasting and generation planning support, applying analytical techniques to solve real-world business problems.

I am currently seeking opportunities to apply and further develop my skills in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, and Data Science within professional environments.

profile.currently: Building my portfolio & exploring ML pipelines

projects.title: Peak Demand Risk Forecasting and Generation Planning Support for CEB
projects.description: Developed a Decision Analytics solution for the Ceylon Electricity Board to support peak electricity demand forecasting and generation planning.
projects.details: Conducted EDA on electricity demand, weather, and generation data. Built a Random Forest ML model to classify peak-demand risk levels (Low, Medium, High). Used Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, and Data Visualization. Achieved 68.48% classification accuracy. Designed a decision-support framework for risk identification and generation scheduling.

projects.title: Mahamaya Girls' College Senior Science Society Website
projects.description: Official website for the Senior Science Society with admin dashboard for managing events, achievements, and research publications.
projects.details: Built with Next.js App Router, Firebase Auth & Storage, and Cloudinary. Features include dynamic admin dashboard, research paper management (search, filtering, uploads), responsive UI, SEO optimization, and secure file handling.

projects.title: HappyPaws – Full-Stack Android Mobile Application
projects.description: Full-stack Android pet supply shopping app built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and Material Design 3.
projects.details: Features MVVM architecture, Retrofit networking with Coroutines, product browsing with category filtering, cart management, checkout, user authentication, and sensor integration (gyroscope, camera, battery status). PHP backend with RESTful APIs.

projects.title: HappyPaws – Full-Stack E-Commerce Web Application
projects.description: Complete full-stack e-commerce system built with Laravel 11, MySQL, and MongoDB.
projects.details: MVC architecture with RESTful APIs for auth, products, cart, orders, and payments. Dual database integration: MySQL for relational data, MongoDB for feedback/reviews. Role-based dashboards for admin and customers. HTTPS-secured deployment via Ngrok.

projects.title: Fix-It – Emergency Technician Booking App
projects.description: Mobile app prototype for booking trusted technicians during emergencies. Role: UI/UX Designer.
projects.details: Designed in Figma with role-based onboarding (Customer, Technician, Admin), live technician tracking, in-app payment, and admin dashboard. User-centered design approach with real-time scenario mapping.

projects.title: Sports Event Management System
projects.description: Desktop application for managing sports events built with C# and Microsoft SQL Server.
projects.details: Features user registration, team management, match scheduling, score tracking, and result generation. Applied OOP principles (encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism) for modular and scalable system design.

projects.title: Green Grocers Super Market Further Development
projects.description: Enhanced e-commerce functionality added to a supermarket website with cart, favourites, and checkout.
projects.details: Added Add to Cart, Add to Favourites, and demo checkout system using JavaScript and JSON. Built upon a responsive website with product categorization, promotional banners, dynamic search/filtering, and wireframe-driven UI/UX.

projects.title: Green Grocers Super Market
projects.description: Responsive supermarket website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as an introductory web project.
projects.details: Designed wireframes for intuitive UI/UX. Included product categories, promotional banners, dynamic search, and filtering features to improve customer engagement.

projects.title: AirGuard – AI-Powered Smart Air Quality Monitoring and Prediction System
projects.description: AI-powered IoT air quality monitoring platform that collects hyperlocal environmental data and predicts future air quality conditions to support smarter travel and healthier decision-making.
projects.details:
Developed an AI and IoT-based air quality intelligence platform combining real-time sensor data, weather information, and machine learning for short-term AQI prediction.

Designed the complete data pipeline including sensor data collection, preprocessing, dataset preparation, feature engineering, and machine learning model development. Implemented a Random Forest-based prediction approach to forecast air quality trends and risk levels.

The system integrates ESP32-based edge data collection, ThingSpeak communication, PostgreSQL with TimescaleDB for time-series storage, Python-based AI processing, and a Next.js API connected with a Flutter mobile application.

AirGuard provides hyperlocal air quality insights, future AQI predictions, and intelligent recommendations to support tourists, communities, and organizations in making safer, data-driven decisions.

Lead interactive sessions for the Gen Z Guide to Life workshop series focusing on personal growth, mindset development, and self-leadership. Design and deliver engaging activities promoting participation, reflection, and meaningful discussion.

Support new and continuing students in adapting to university life. Guide students through the university environment and contribute to planning orientation programs, club festivals, workshops, and engagement events.
